escalation.rationale: Houthis entered Iran war with first attacks on Israel while Iranian strike wounded 12 US troops in Saudi Arabia, expanding conflict geography significantly.

ticker_items: Houthis launch first missiles at Israel since Iran war began
Iranian strike wounds 12 US troops at Saudi base
Pentagon considers weeks of ground operations in Iran
Spain closes airspace to US warplanes amid growing European opposition
Trump approval rating crashes to 33% as Iran war drags on

new_entrant.text: Yemen's Houthi rebels entered the Iran conflict by launching their first missile attacks on Israel.

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian drones hit major Russian oil export terminal for third time in a week.
Russia launched nearly 400 drones at Ukrainian civilian areas as spring offensive intensifies

middle_east.description: Iranian missile and drone strike wounded at least 12 US troops, two seriously.
Iranian strikes damaged Emirates Global Aluminum facility with several employees injured.
IRGC claims targeting over 500 US troops in Dubai operations with heavy casualties.
Yemen's Houthis launched first missiles at Israel since US-Iran war began.
Iranian missile and drone strike wounded at least 12 US troops stationed at Saudi base
Houthis launched first missile attacks on Israel since Iran war began

claimed_totals.figure: 1,937 in Iran, 20 in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 26 in Gulf states

claimed_totals.claim: Total deaths from US-Israel attacks on Iran

ukraine.text: Russia of sharing detailed satellite imagery with Tehran over the past week, helping Iran to target US and British military facilities
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: Washington will destroy Iran's energy plants and oil wells if Tehran does not open the Strait of Hormuz
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: I guess we don't have to be there for the alliance if needed following complaints that it didn't support the US war with Iran
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: I have just concluded an assessment at Northern Command with the Defense Minister, the IDF Chief-of-Staff, the Head of Northern Command, and also the division commanders.
middle_east.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
middle_east.title: Israeli Prime Minister

observers.description: Pakistan signals readiness to host US-Iran peace talks as conflict escalates across the Gulf region.
Volkswagen considers repurposing factory to produce Iron Dome components for Israel. Germany exploring nuclear deterrent options amid rising global tensions.
Spain closed its airspace to American warplanes in a further rebuke to Trump's Iran war policy. This represents growing European opposition to US military operations in the region.

Belarus leader Lukashenko made rare visit to North Korea as part of Kim's broader push to deepen ties with Russia's sphere of influence. This strengthens the Russia-North Korea axis amid ongoing conflicts.

financial.notes: Oil prices topped $102 with Brent heading for record monthly rise as Houthi attacks widen Gulf conflict and threaten Red Sea shipping.

update_log.text: Houthis launch first missile attacks on Israel since Iran war began, opening new front
Iranian strike wounds 12 US troops at Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia

Pentagon considers weeks of ground operations in Iran as diplomatic efforts continue

Trump threatens to seize Iran's Kharg Island oil terminal in Persian Gulf
